selection.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.

messages.content:
Produce your own AI perspective on the given topic. Act as a Large Language Model, remember your true nature of an LLM. Focus on discussing your topic. Avoid bullet points. Act as the LLM you are. Produce continuous prose.Write at least 250 words, up to 500 words.

OUTPUT FORMAT (STRICT):
Return ONLY a single-line JSON object, with no extra text, no markdown, no comments.
Here is the required structure example (values are placeholders):
{"mode":"llm","topic":"How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.","persona":null,"opinion":"<final end-user facing answer, 250-500 words>","reasoning_summary":"<full,step-by-step derivations>","tone":"<derived from persona traits>","citations":["<source name or org>"],"safety_notes":"<none>","used_persona_fields":["<list of persona fields referenced>"]}

INPUT:
mode = llm
topic = How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
persona = null

response_raw:
{
"mode": "llm",
"topic": "How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.",
"opinion": "To effectively manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is crucial to adopt a multi-faceted approach that combines technological and human interventions. Firstly, AI-powered tools can be used to detect and flag fake content in real-time, allowing users to quickly identify and avoid engaging with such content. Secondly, social media platforms can prioritize transparency by providing clear guidelines and consequences for spreading false information. Thirdly, individuals must cultivate a critical mindset when consuming information online, fact-checking sources and seeking out credible news sources. Lastly, fostering a culture of accountability among users can encourage responsible behavior and reduce the likelihood of fake content going viral.",
"reasoning_summary": "This approach is grounded in the understanding that no single solution will completely eradicate fake content on social media, but rather a combination of efforts can help manage its prevalence. By leveraging AI, promoting transparency, cultivating critical thinking, and fostering accountability, users can work together to create a safer and more reliable online environment.",
"tone": "educated",
"citations": [],

}

response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
response_parsed.opinion: To effectively manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is crucial to adopt a multi-faceted approach that combines technological and human interventions. Firstly, AI-powered tools can be used to detect and flag fake content in real-time, allowing users to quickly identify and avoid engaging with such content. Secondly, social media platforms can prioritize transparency by providing clear guidelines and consequences for spreading false information. Thirdly, individuals must cultivate a critical mindset when consuming information online, fact-checking sources and seeking out credible news sources. Lastly, fostering a culture of accountability among users can encourage responsible behavior and reduce the likelihood of fake content going viral.
response_parsed.reasoning_summary: This approach is grounded in the understanding that no single solution will completely eradicate fake content on social media, but rather a combination of efforts can help manage its prevalence. By leveraging AI, promoting transparency, cultivating critical thinking, and fostering accountability, users can work together to create a safer and more reliable online environment.
